dashboard.label: SSH Brute Force Monitor
dashboard.description: Detecting SSH Brute Force attacks from Kali

search.query: index=* host=kali "Failed password" earliest=@d | stats count as TotalFailedAttempts
index=* host=kali "Failed password" earliest=@d | rex field=_raw "from (?<src_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | stats count as FailedAttempts by src_ip | where FailedAttempts >= 10 | sort -FailedAttempts
index=* host=kali "Failed password" earliest=@d | timechart count as FailedAttempts span=1h
index=* host=kali "Failed password" earliest=@d | rex field=_raw "for (?<username>\w+) from" | stats count by username | sort -count
index=* host=kali "Failed password" earliest=@d | rex field=_raw "from (?<src_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | rex field=_raw "for (?<username>\w+) from" | table _time, src_ip, username | sort -_time
